mapping_rationale: Agriculture/forestry/fishing - closest SPDR proxy is Materials
Oil and gas extraction and field services - Energy
Food beverage and tobacco manufacturing - Staples
Lumber furniture paper and allied products - Materials
Printing/publishing - pre-2018 GICS media sat in Discretionary
GICS 2018 restructure moved media to Communication Services (XLC inception)
Drugs pharma and biologicals - Health Care
Motor vehicles and parts - Discretionary (GICS autos)
Aerospace rail and ship building - Industrials
Guided missiles space and defense - Industrials
Instruments incl lab/analytical (coarse - refine at validation) - Health Care
Medical devices and supplies - Health Care
Railroads trucking air and transport services - Industrials
Telecom pre-2018 - original 1998 SPDR taxonomy carried telecom inside XLK (T/VZ were XLK members)
GICS 2018 moved telecom to Communication Services (XLC inception)
Electric gas water and sanitary services - Utilities
Wholesale durable/nondurable distribution - Industrials (GICS trading companies/distributors)
General merchandise and apparel retail - Discretionary
Auto dealers home furnishings eating and drinking - Discretionary
Banks credit insurance carriers and brokers - Financials
Real estate pre-XLRE - REITs/real estate lived in XLF before XLRE inception
Investment offices and holding companies - Financials
GICS 2018 moved advertising to Communication Services
Credit reporting staffing and facility services - Industrials
Computer programming/data processing incl internet content pre-2018 - Technology
GICS 2018 moved internet content/search (META GOOGL class of SIC 7370) to Communication Services - the sector-change-without-SIC-change case
Software IT services prepackaged software (MSFT 7372) - Technology
Auto repair rental and misc repair - Discretionary
Movies entertainment and recreation pre-2018 - Discretionary
GICS 2018 moved movies/entertainment (NFLX 7841 class) to Communication Services
Health services hospitals and clinics - Health Care
Engineering accounting and management services - Industrials
Commercial physical/biological research (biotech research) - Health Care
Research management and related services - Industrials
